meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Scale Faster with Antigravity Project Templates
content.seo_description: Stop manual coding. Learn to use the Antigravity project template with Claude Code to automate architecture and scale your freelance dev projects instantly.
content.answer_block: To break the scaling ceiling, you must move from manual coding to template-driven automation. By integrating Antigravity project templates with Claude Code, you standardize your architecture, eliminate repetitive boilerplate, and ensure every client delivery maintains enterprise-grade consistency. This workflow transforms your development process from artisanal craft to a scalable, high-velocity machine.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, another client is asking for a 'quick' feature, and your codebase has become a tangled web of technical debt. You are stuck in the freelancer's trap: the more you build, the slower you go. The manual repetition of setting up authentication, database schemas, and API routes is bleeding your profit margins dry and stalling your growth.

But what if you could ship a production-ready foundation in minutes instead of days? Enter the Antigravity project template. By decoupling your business logic from the boilerplate, you gain the ability to deploy standardized, high-quality architectures with a single command. It is time to stop reinventing the wheel and start scaling your output.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Core
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure using the Antigravity framework to ensure all future modules follow a unified architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with TypeScript, Postgres, and Next.js support.

steps.title: Define Schema via Natural Language
steps.description: Translate client requirements into a database schema using Antigravity's schema-generator to maintain relational integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS multi-tenant application including users, subscriptions, and project entities.

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan your schema and generate fully typed CRUD API endpoints, saving hours of manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API routes for all entities in the schema, following the Antigravity controller pattern.

steps.title: Implement Middleware and Auth
steps.description: Inject standardized authentication middleware across all protected routes to ensure security consistency across every client project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply Antigravity auth-guard middleware to all routes under the /api/v1 prefix.

steps.title: Validation and Deployment Prep
steps.description: Run a final audit on your generated code to ensure it meets production standards before shipping to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project against Antigravity best practices and suggest performance optimizations.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Golden Template' repository that you update quarterly as industry standards evolve.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store client-specific coding styles so every project feels bespoke.
Automate the deployment pipeline within your Antigravity template to push to Vercel or AWS with one command.
Document your custom prompt library in Notion; reuse your best-performing prompt chains across different clients.
Keep your schema files modular so you can swap out database providers without refactoring your entire API layer.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, audit your time-to-market and begin creating custom CLI aliases for your most frequent tasks to shave off another 20% of development time.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting manual setup kill your freelance career. Build faster, charge more, and reclaim your weekends by mastering the Antigravity ecosystem. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
